message:
feat(core): add bounded input ring with backpressure and sojourn tracking (ft-2p9cb.2.2.1)

Implements B2 spec for wait-free input ring:
- InputRing: fixed-capacity FIFO with O(1) enqueue/dequeue and wraparound
- RingBackpressure: Accept/SlowDown/Full based on high-water mark
- InputRingItem: seq-numbered items with arrival timestamps
- Sojourn tracking: mean time-in-ring for latency monitoring
- InputRingSnapshot: diagnostic state capture
- 13 new unit tests (228 total), all 91 proptests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
